title: Ali Baba Goes to Town
writer: Harry Tugend, Jack Yellen, Gene Towne
actors: Eddie Cantor, Tony Martin, Roland Young
plot: A movie company is filming the "Arabian Nights" when a hobo enters their camp, falls asleep and dreams he's back in Baghdad as advisor to the Sultan. In a spoof of Roosevelt's New Deal, he organizes work programs, taxes the rich a...
